text:
Organizations (MAOs) 

FILE(S): IP base 
SNF base 
HH base 
OP base 

VALUES: For facility type code 1 thru 6, and 9: 

1 = Inpatient 
2 = Inpatient or home health 
(covered on Part B) 
3 = Outpatient (or HHA — covered 
on Part A) 
4 = Other (Part B) — (Includes 
HHA medical and other health 
 services, e.g., SNF 
osteoporosis-injectable drugs) 
5 = Intermediate care — level I 
6 = Intermediate care — level II 
7 = Subacute inpatient (revenue 
code 019X required) (formerly 
Intermediate care —
